'''shayïfzïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tabiya|tabiya]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-y-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tabiya|tabiya]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| shayïfzïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || shayïfzïfth || shayïfzïfj || shayïfzïfsh || shayïfzïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || shayïfyïfzïfth || shayïfyïfzïfj || shayïfyïfzïfsh || shayïfyïfzïf
|}

''8 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || shayïfzïfïf || shayïfzïfïf || shayïfzïfïf || shayïfzïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || shayïfzïfth || shayïfzïfj || shayïfzïfsh || shayïfzïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || shayïfzïfïfl || shayïfzïfïfl || shayïfzïfïfl || shayïfzïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || shayïfzïfïfïf || shayïfzïfïfïf || shayïfzïfïfïf || shayïfzïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || shayïfzïfïfn || shayïfzïfïfn || shayïfzïfïfn || shayïfzïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || shayïfzïfïforo || shayïfzïfïforo || shayïfzïfïforo || shayïfzïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|29134ca}}
